prompt: A 2D game UI icon for a shuffle button that randomizes the order of letters in a Scrabble-style hand. The icon consists of two stylized, clean arced arrows, one pointing left-down and one pointing right-up, arranged in a perfect circular flow to visually suggest movement, rotation, and swapping. Simple flat design with no gradients, no shadows, no 3D depth, no text, and no background, just the clean icon on a solid transparent background. The arced arrows are drawn in a flat, solid neutral medium-light gray color (#DCDCDC) so the icon can be color-tinted later. Clean, casual, and friendly puzzle game UI style.
